titleStmt.title: SII 36.168: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 168. (A.R. No. 168 of 1910.) ERŌḌE, ERODE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Ardrakapālēśvara temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1426, Rudrodgari, Paṅkuṉi 25, Wednesday, Rōhiṇi = A.D. 1504, March 21, Thursday.).

Gift of 20 mā of land for undertaking repairs and conducting festival in the temple of Toṇḍīśvaramuḍaiya Mahādēva at Īrōḍu (Erōḍe) in Kāñchittuṇḍam, a subdivision of Mēlkarai Pūndurai-nāḍu by the Chief. Mentions one mā of land consited of 256 kuḻis measured by the measuring rod with a length of 24 aḍi (length of human foot).
Published in ERMK., Vol. I, No. 1009/2003, p. 29.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī man śrī vīrarāya tāvakkamāraiya nāyakka Uṭaiyar prativirācciyam paṇṇāniṉṟa cakāttam [1000 4 100 2 10 6] cellā niṉṟa Utiroṟkāri varuṣam paṅkūṉi mātam 2 10 5 tikati pañcamiyum putavāramum peṟṟa Urokaṇi nakṣatramum kūṭiṉa nāḷ melkarai pūnturai nāṭṭuk kāñcittuṇṭattīroṭṭu toṇṭīcuramuṭaiya makātevaṟku nammuṭaiya taṉma
tiruppaṇi tirunāḷukkum naṭappatāka Aṇaikkīḷp pālaimeṭu kuṟavaṉ karaiyil nilattilirupattunālaṭik kolāle Irunūṟṟu Aṉpattu Āṟu kuḻi koṇṭatu Oru māvāka Irupatu mā nilamum tārāpūṟuvamākac caṉṉatiyile tārai vāttuk kuṭuttom Inta taṉmam cantirātityavarai naṭattavum Inta nilattile veccavi
lāṭam Inta taṉma Akitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyil kārām pacuvaiyum pirāmaṇaraiyum koṉPortion not engraved.
Digital edition of SII 36.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
